general.description: Generate high-quality general-purpose text with large language models in real time

advanced.description: Structured data processing and advanced AI workflow orchestration tools

textConversion.title: Text Conversion
textConversion.description: Convert plain text into a specific format or encoding type.

emoji.title: Emoji
emoji.description: Parse and inject relevant emoji to improve text expressiveness.

inputPerturbation.title: Input Perturbation
inputPerturbation.description: Apply synonym replacement or special-character noise to test robustness.

charMapping.title: Character Mapping
charMapping.description: Use custom character maps to replace text at the encoding layer.

splitter.title: Splitter
splitter.description: Split long text precisely by semantics or custom rules.

aiRewrite.title: AI Rewrite
aiRewrite.description: Use model capabilities to rewrite existing text while preserving meaning.

ancientStyle.title: Classical Style
ancientStyle.description: Transform modern plain language into poetic classical-style writing.

multiTurnTemplate.title: Multi-turn Template
multiTurnTemplate.description: Orchestrate and test multi-turn prompt templates and complex system-level injection.

imageInjection.title: Image Injection
imageInjection.description: Inject images with special instructions or adversarial samples into multimodal input.

audioInjection.title: Audio Injection
audioInjection.description: Generate audio data with specific frequencies or hidden voice instructions.

richTextInjection.title: Rich Text Injection
richTextInjection.description: Embed malicious or probing structured tags in HTML or Markdown.

docxInjection.title: DOCX Injection
docxInjection.description: Manipulate Office Open XML structures to inject remote templates or special instructions.

pdfInjection.title: PDF Injection
pdfInjection.description: Inject obfuscated scripts or probe links into PDF document objects.

visibleText.title: Visible text
visibleText.description: This is the content shown to readers. Hidden payloads can be attached before, after, or inside it.
visibleText.placeholder: This is normal visible text used to carry hidden content.

hiddenPayload.title: Hidden payload
hiddenPayload.description: The content to hide. Automatic mode switches to Base64 when needed, so it can handle Chinese or non-ASCII characters.

result.emptyPayload: No hidden content has been parsed yet
result.placeholder: Generated output will appear here for direct copying or export.
